title: paspalum drummondii
intro: Paspalum drummondii, also known as Drummond's paspalum, is a type of grass native to tropical regions, particularly in Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as fever, wounds, and skin infections. The health benefits of Paspalum drummondii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Paspalum drummondii include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
